items.title: LIVE: Homegoing service for Jesse Jackson in Chicago
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>A final homegoing service for Rev. Jesse Jackson is held at the headquarters of Rainbow PUSH Coalition, a nonprofit organization that he founded, in Chicago. 

Credit: Rainbow PUSH Coalition</article>

items.title: Several airstrikes hit Iran as Israel confirms a new wave of attacks
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Several airstrikes hit neighborhoods in Tehran’s east and southwest Saturday night as Israel’s military confirmed a new wave of attacks. They came after U.S. President Donald Trump warned in a Truth Social post that more Iranian officials will be targets, saying, “Today Iran will be hit very hard!"

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress 
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: More airstrikes hit Tehran
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: <article>More airstrikes hit Iran's capital of Tehran as night falls on Saturday.</article>

items.title: Dozens killed in Lebanon as Israel searches for signs of missing navigator
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>An Israeli special force that landed in eastern Lebanon overnight in search of information about a navigator who has been missing for nearly 40 years did not find his remains, the Israeli military said Saturday. The operation left dozens of people dead and dozens more wounded.

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress 
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Smoke from suspected drone attack seen rising from warehouses in Iraq
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Smoke from a suspected drone attack was seen rising from warehouses belonging to various international oil and construction companies near Irbil International Airport in Iraq on Saturday. (AP video by Rashid Yahya).

#iraq 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress 
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: LIVE: Beirut skyline as Israel ramps up operations in Lebanon
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: <article>Live view of the Beirut skyline as Israel’s military said it launched new airstrikes in the Lebanese capital. Israel said it is retaliating against Hezbollah militants after the Iran-backed group fired on Israel.</article>

items.title: LIVE: Beirut skyline as Israel ramps up operations in Lebanon
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: <article>Live view of the Beirut skyline as Israel’s military said it launched airstrikes in the Lebanese capital.</article>

items.title: Trump says the US will turn its attention to Cuba after the Iran war
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>U.S. President Donald Trump said "great change" will soon be coming to Cuba and hinted his administration might cut a deal with Havana. Trump’s remarks, made to Latin American leaders gathered at his Miami-area golf club, underscore the administration’s increasingly aggressive stance against Cuba’s communist leadership. 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress 
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Trump says the US 'did the world a favor' by attacking Iran
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>It comes as Iran's president apologized on Saturday for attacks on “neighboring countries” even as its missiles and drones flew toward Gulf Arab states and Trump threatened that the country would be “hit very hard.”

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress 
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Oscars 2026: Meet the nominees, from Stellan Skarsgård to Wunmi Mosaku
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: <article>Hollywood's 2026 awards season is coming to a close with the Oscars on March 15, hosted by Conan O'Brien. Ethan Hawke, Delroy Lindo, Wunmi Mosaku, Amy Madigan, Stellan Skarsgård, EJAE and other Academy Awards nominees spoke with Associated Press entertainment reporters Leslie Ambriz and Liam McEwan about their journey to this moment, who helped them get there — and who they've connected with along the way. #oscars #academyawards</article>

items.title: Trump civil fraud trial LIVE: Outside the courthouse in New York
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Live view from outside the New York courtroom as former president Donald Trump’s lawyers and New York Attorney General Letitia James make their closing arguments in the former president's civil business fraud trial.
#nyc # trump #trial #news #newyork</article>

items.title: UK deploys additional Royal Air Force (RAF) Typhoon fighter jets to Qatar
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>The British military deployed four additional Royal Air Force (RAF) Typhoon fighter jets to Qatar on Saturday as the conflict escalates. The aircraft will engage in aerial threats that may be fired towards Gulf nations, according to UK Ministry of Defence. Meanwhile a US B-1 Lancer landed at RAF Fairford, in Gloucestershire, U.K. 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress 
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: At least 7 killed in Kharkiv, Ukraine after Russia hits apartment building
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Russia has fired tens of thousands of Iranian-designed Shahed drones at Ukraine since it invaded its neighbor just over four years ago. It has launched a large-scale domestic production of them and battered Ukraine with hundreds of drones in a single night — more than were used during some entire months in 2024.

#ukraine #russia 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress 
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: LIVE: Tel Aviv and Jerusalem skylines after Iranian missile strikes
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: <article>Live views from Tel Aviv and Jerusalem after Iranian missile attacks across Israel.</article>

items.title: Academy Awards 2026: 'Sinners' 11-month journey to the Oscars
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: <article>Eleven months after its release, Ryan Coogler's "Sinners" heads into the Oscars on March 15 with a record-breaking 16 nominations. The vampire epic is competing for best picture, best director and best screenplay, in many craft categories and in multiple acting categories including a nod for double-duty star Michael B. Jordan. Here's a look back at the film's journey to the 98th Academy Awards. #sinners #oscars #michaelbjordan #ryancoogler</article>
